# Deliberately broken Python — mimics the C1 misindented top-level block bug.
# Stored as .txt so test discovery never auto-runs this file.
# test_quality_gates.py copies it to a temp dir as .py to verify the syntax gate.

def watch_sessions():
    """Simulated watcher function."""
    sessions = []
    for s in sessions:
        print(s)
        # next line is misindented (extra 4 spaces = IndentationError)
            return s
